name: Roman Polanski
abstract: Raymond Roman Thierry Polański (né Liebling; born 18 August 1933) is a Polish and French filmmaker and actor. He is the recipient of numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, three British Academy Film Awards, ten César Awards, and two Golden Globe Awards as well as a Golden Bear and a Palme d'Or.

about_quotes.speaker: Chico Hamilton
about_quotes.evidence: I did the film with Roman Polanski, Repulsion... I hooked up with Roman Polanski with -- Jerry Schatzberg introduced me to Roman... Roman knew I was there and asked me to do the film, do the music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chico Hamilton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: The director was Roman Polanski, and he’s describing a scene where we look down the hallway... They interviewed the cinematographer who worked on “Rosemary’s Baby.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020
